channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-4342] Test failure on test suite sanity-lfsck, subtest test_6a
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Di Wang <di.wang@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: http://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/00456694-5c4c-11e3-9d08-52540035b04c.

The sub-test test_6a failed with the following error:

test failed to respond and timed out, and this happens with my patch, but the patch does not change anything of this. So it is probably some issues already exists in master.

23:40:23:LustreError: 14531:0:(qsd_handler.c:1136:qsd_op_adjust()) ASSERTION( qqi ) failed: 
23:40:25:LustreError: 14531:0:(qsd_handler.c:1136:qsd_op_adjust()) LBUG
23:40:25:Pid: 14531, comm: umount
23:40:25:
23:40:26:Call Trace:
23:40:26: [<ffffffffa05f6895>] libcfs_debug_dumpstack+0x55/0x80 [libcfs]
23:40:27: [<ffffffffa05f6e97>] lbug_with_loc+0x47/0xb0 [libcfs]
23:40:28: [<ffffffffa0d984e8>] qsd_op_adjust+0x478/0x580 [lquota]
23:40:28: [<ffffffff8119db8d>] ? generic_drop_inode+0x1d/0x80
23:40:29: [<ffffffffa0de5237>] osd_object_delete+0x217/0x2f0 [osd_ldiskfs]
23:40:29: [<ffffffffa072a319>] lu_object_free+0x89/0x1b0 [obdclass]
23:40:30: [<ffffffffa060bb52>] ? cfs_hash_bd_from_key+0x42/0xd0 [libcfs]
23:40:31: [<ffffffffa072aa8d>] lu_object_put+0xad/0x330 [obdclass]
23:40:32: [<ffffffffa0d878ed>] qsd_qtype_fini+0xdd/0x3a0 [lquota]
23:40:33: [<ffffffffa0d87f11>] qsd_fini+0xd1/0x460 [lquota]
23:40:33: [<ffffffffa0dd6c78>] osd_shutdown+0x38/0xe0 [osd_ldiskfs]
23:40:35: [<ffffffffa0de3c3d>] osd_process_config+0x14d/0x1a0 [osd_ldiskfs]
23:40:35: [<ffffffffa0fa8809>] lod_process_config+0x2b9/0xc70 [lod]
23:40:35: [<ffffffffa072b7bb>] ? lu_site_purge+0x23b/0x4a0 [obdclass]
23:40:37: [<ffffffff811685ac>] ? __kmalloc+0x20c/0x220
23:40:37: [<ffffffffa1029930>] mdd_process_config+0x210/0x5e0 [mdd]
23:40:39: [<ffffffffa0ed9fb3>] ? lustre_cfg_new+0x2d3/0x6e0 [mdt]
23:40:39: [<ffffffffa0eda536>] mdt_stack_fini+0x176/0xb90 [mdt]
23:40:41: [<ffffffffa1028475>] ? mdd_init_capa_ctxt+0xf5/0x130 [mdd]
23:40:42: [<ffffffffa0edb5a8>] mdt_device_fini+0x658/0xda0 [mdt]
23:40:43: [<ffffffffa0719b73>] class_cleanup+0x573/0xd30 [obdclass]
23:40:44: [<ffffffffa06f6f26>] ? class_name2dev+0x56/0xe0 [obdclass]
23:40:44: [<ffffffffa071b89a>] class_process_config+0x156a/0x1ad0 [obdclass]
23:40:46: [<ffffffffa0714393>] ? lustre_cfg_new+0x2d3/0x6e0 [obdclass]
23:40:46: [<ffffffffa071bf77>] class_manual_cleanup+0x177/0x6f0 [obdclass]
23:40:48: [<ffffffffa06f6f26>] ? class_name2dev+0x56/0xe0 [obdclass]
23:40:48: [<ffffffffa0756c1c>] server_put_super+0x5ec/0xf60 [obdclass]
23:40:49: [<ffffffff8118366b>] generic_shutdown_super+0x5b/0xe0
23:40:51: [<ffffffff81183756>] kill_anon_super+0x16/0x60
23:40:51: [<ffffffffa071de26>] lustre_kill_super+0x36/0x60 [obdclass]
23:40:53: [<ffffffff81183ef7>] deactivate_super+0x57/0x80
23:40:53: [<ffffffff811a21ef>] mntput_no_expire+0xbf/0x110
23:40:55: [<ffffffff811a2c5b>] sys_umount+0x7b/0x3a0
23:40:57: [<ffffffff8100b072>] system_call_fastpath+0x16/0x1b

Info required for matching: sanity-lfsck 6a
item.summary: Test failure on test suite sanity-lfsck, subtest test_6a

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Closing this since we haven't seen it in a long time.
Moving this off 2.6.0, since it hasn't been reported since the initial test failure.

Niu

Could you please comment on this one?

Peter
